name: Digital Green
description: Technology-driven organization and platform that uses participatory video and data-driven approaches to share agricultural knowledge with smallholder farmers. Provides tools for extension worker management, farmer engagement, and impact tracking.

name: DHIS2
description: While primarily a health information platform, DHIS2 has been adapted for agricultural data management, farmer registry, and extension service tracking in several countries. Its flexible data model supports custom agricultural use cases.
